label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let me try to figure out this problem. So there are five people: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each has a present of a different color. The initial gifts are: - Alice: green - Bob: purple - Claire: blue - Dave: black - Eve: red Then they swap gifts in a series of steps. The question is asking which gift Eve ends up with after all the swaps. Let me go through each swap step by step. First swap: Dave and Claire swap. So initially, Dave has the black ball and Claire has the blue present. After swapping, Dave now has the blue present, and Claire has the black ball. Let me note that down: After first swap: - Dave: blue - Claire: black Second swap: Bob and Alice swap. Bob has purple, Alice has green. After swapping, Bob has green and Alice has purple. After second swap: - Bob: green - Alice: purple Third swap: Eve and Bob swap. Eve has red, Bob has green. After swapping, Eve has green, Bob has red. After third swap: - Eve: green - Bob: red Fourth swap: Bob and Dave swap. At this point, Bob has red, Dave has blue. After swapping, Bob gets blue, Dave gets red. After fourth swap: - Bob: blue - Dave: red Fifth swap: Bob and Eve swap. Now Bob has blue, Eve has green. After swapping, Bob gets green, Eve gets blue. After fifth swap: - Bob: green - Eve: blue So
